author: audit-agent

patch.value: UX: Telemetry shows 84 'No update flags provided' errors - improve guidance

Telemetry analysis shows 84 occurrences of 'No update flags provided' error. Users call pm update <ID> without specifying what to change. The error message should proactively suggest common flags (--status, --description, --body, --tags). Additionally 70 errors for 'Invalid --status value closed' - users try --status closed instead of pm close. And 56 errors for 'Item undefined not found' suggesting a caller passes no ID.

message: UX finding from telemetry error analysis
